'''Wurf'al''' was a male [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] onboard the [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] who was related to [[Avke Saz'ula]] by marriage, which gave him a disdain for [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]], and was the great nephew of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]]. He was killed by [[Gorog]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] trying to save a bust of the "great" Admiral.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
